question:
Every numpus is floral. Numpuses are jompuses. Jompuses are not nervous. Each jompus is an impus. Every impus is brown. Every dumpus is not amenable. Each impus is a wumpus. Wumpuses are not bitter. Each wumpus is a zumpus. Every zumpus is not small. Zumpuses are vumpuses. Vumpuses are hot. Vumpuses are rompuses. Rompuses are amenable. Every rompus is a tumpus. Every tumpus is bright. Every tumpus is a yumpus. Alex is an impus.

Is the following statement true or false? Alex is amenable.
